What I Offer

Services & Expertise

From operations to creative output — I'm a one-stop remote professional who delivers consistent, high-quality work across every area your business needs.

📋

Administrative Support

Calendar management, scheduling, data entry, file organization, documentation, and workflow coordination — everything runs without you lifting a finger.

📊

Spreadsheets & Google Workspace

Google Sheets, Docs, Drive — building trackers, financial records, formatted reports, organized file systems, and collaborative documents.

✉️

Email Management & Marketing

Inbox management, professional correspondence, email campaign coordination, follow-ups, and client communication — handled with precision.

✍️

Copywriting & Content Writing

SEO-optimized captions, blog posts, ad copy, product descriptions, and marketing scripts that convert — written with a clear, engaging voice.

🎨

Graphic Design

Branded social media posts, banners, infographics, menus, promotional materials — all visually cohesive with your brand identity using Canva.

📱

Social Media Management

Content calendar, scheduling, publishing, community management, analytics tracking via Meta Insights. Proven page growth through strategic content.

🎯

Lead Generation

Identifying and qualifying potential clients, building prospect lists, outreach coordination, and tracking leads through the pipeline systematically.

📣

Senior Marketing & Operations

Strategic content planning, campaign management, ad oversight, performance reporting, and end-to-end marketing operations support.

🎬

Video Editing

Short-form Reels and TikTok content using CapCut — product launches, behind-the-scenes, and promotional clips edited for maximum reach and engagement.

Sample Work

Portfolio Highlights

Here is a look at the creative deliverables I produce for clients — from branded menus to customer feedback graphics and brand identity visuals.

Canva · Menu Design

Cassava Classics — Full Menu

Complete menu design with product photography, pricing layout, flavor categories, and brand-consistent typography. Designed for print and digital use.

Canva · Marketing Graphic

Real Feedback Campaign Graphic

Social proof graphic featuring customer testimonials, product imagery, brand values, and visual hierarchy — designed to build trust and drive conversions.

Canva · Infographic

Sweetness Level Infographic

Educational product infographic communicating customization options clearly. Clean layout with visual scale indicators and brand-aligned design.

Canva · Brand Identity

Brand Identity — Logo Visual

Atmospheric brand photography-style visual featuring the Cassava Classics logo in its natural product environment — dark wood, plants, artisan textures.

Meta Insights · Analytics

Page Analytics Management

28.8K views, 13.4K unique viewers, 1.1K interactions, and 84.8% response rate — tracked and optimized through Meta Insights monthly reporting.

Facebook Ads · Content

Ad Campaigns & Content Calendar

Multi-format content published weekly — countdown posts, engagement polls, product spotlights, and ad campaigns managed end-to-end within budget.
